column6: Difficult to identify the issue, interpret the report (AWR, ADDM, Execution Plan, ...) and apply the appropriate solution to fix the problem
column9:
I mostly use explain plan and SQL Tuning advisor to review the the execution plan and check the recommendation for a specific query. 
Interpreting explain plan is quite challenge. There are many operators, and I am not sure how those operators work. I also check on the AWR and ADDM to find the high performance query and try to tune it. Mostly I check and find for index recommendation.
column11: I am interesting with the course outline, plz help to cover all points and detail explain and also include the real case if possible.
